source_name: European Banking Authority
title: The EBA launches consultation on key performance indicators of Taxonomy disclosures
clean_title: The EBA launches consultation on key performance indicators of Taxonomy disclosures
summary: The European Banking Authority (EBA) today published a Discussion Paper on certain key performance indicators (KPIs) and other aspects of the Disclosures Delegated Act, under Article 8 of the Taxonomy Regulation. The aim is to consult the public on potential measures to simplify and enhance the usability of information disclosed by credit institutions and investment firms. The consultation is open until 12 August 2026.
why_selected: Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact réglementaire.
impacts: Peut modifier la conformité, les reportings ou la gouvernance des acteurs financiers.
title_signature: consultation disclosures eba indicators key launches performance taxonomy
normalized_title: the eba launches consultation on key performance indicators of taxonomy disclosures
